definitions: A Bhutanese spiritual figure, often associated with fertility and the divine madman Drukpa Kunley.
A revered female deity or dakini in Bhutanese Buddhism, sometimes considered a manifestation of Tara.
examples: Many pilgrims visit temples dedicated to Chimi Om.
The stories of Chimi Om are popular in Bhutanese folklore.
Chimi Om is invoked for blessings of children.
